# Nikolas Sapalidis

> Software engineer and entrepreneur based in Athens, Greece. 16 years old. Builds custom websites, iOS apps, and AI systems from scratch.

## About

Nikolas Sapalidis is a software engineer and founder based in Athens, Greece. He builds custom software — websites, web apps, iOS apps, AI automations, and internal tools — for clients and as independent products. First paying client in February 2026.

He also builds and ships products independently:
- Helpmarq (helpmarq.com) — feedback marketplace for expert feedback on real projects
- Branch AI (npmjs.com/package/branch-ai) — AI-powered npm package, 500+ downloads
- MarketMyApp — app marketing automation
- Creator Roast — creator feedback tool
- Noctiq — iOS sleep app (in development)
